title: clusia quapoya
intro: Clusia quapoya, also known as Quapoya, is a flowering plant native to the Andean region of South America, belonging to the Clusiaceae family. The medicinal properties of Clusia quapoya have been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and gastrointestinal problems. The health benefits of the plant include its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, which can help to soothe digestive issues, reduce pain and inflammation, and boost the immune system. Clusia quapoya can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
